created.description: The timestamp of the user object's creation.

updated.description: The timestamp of the user object's last update.

certificate_distinguished_name.description: The distinguished name from the certificate used to identify this user.

status.description: The user status. The user status. Can be: ACTIVE, BLOCKED or DENIED.

sub_status.description: The user sub-status. Can be: NONE

display_name.description: The display name for the provider.

public_nick_name.description: The public nick name for the provider.

language.description: The provider's language. Formatted as a ISO 639-1 language code plus a ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code, separated by an underscore.

region.description: The provider's region. Formatted as a ISO 639-1 language code plus a ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code, separated by an underscore.

session_timeout.description: The setting for the session timeout of the user in seconds.
